title: December 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 18''' is the 352nd day (353rd in leap years) of the year. There are 13 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Steven Spielberg]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 95|''Star Wars Weekly'' 95]] published.
*1979 – [[Emily Swallow]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' (1977) 93]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]].
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 51]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'']] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 5|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 5]] published.
*2013 – [[Legacy (2013) 10|''Legacy'' (2013) 10]] published.
*2013 – [[Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows 1|''Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows'' 1]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']] released.
*2015 – The [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (novelization)|novelization]] of ''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'' published as an eBook.
*2015 – The [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (audiobook)|audiobook]] of the novelization of ''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'' released for download.
*2015 – The [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] of ''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'' released.
*2015 – ''[[Before the Awakening]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Rey's Survival Guide]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: New Adventures]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Collection: Star Wars: The Force Awakens]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars Mix & Match]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: Flashlight Adventure Book]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: The Force Awakens]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Rey Meets BB-8]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Finn & the First Order]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Finn & Rey Escape!]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Han & Chewie Return!]]'' published.
*2015 – [[5-Minute Star Wars Stories (2015)|''5-Minute Star Wars Stories'']] published.
*2015 – ''[[Lightsaber Rescue]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Insider 186|''Star Wars Insider'' 186]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Empire Ascendant 1|''Empire Ascendant'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[The Rise of Kylo Ren 1|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 29|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 29]] published.
*2019 – "[[Chapter 7: The Reckoning]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 16: The Rescue]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – ''[[The Vow of Silver Dawn]]'' chapters four and five are published.
*[[2024]] – [[Ahsoka 6|''Ahsoka'' 6]] published.
*2024 – [[Ewoks (2024) 3|''Ewoks'' (2024) 3]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 13|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 13]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone 3|''The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone'' 3]] published.
*2024 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures Phase III - The Wedding Spectacular]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – 10th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].
*2025 – [[Han & Chewie Return! (audiobook)|''Han & Chewie Return!'' audiobook]] released.
